heading: Qualifications for Office of Delegate
label: 1733 Qualifications for Office of Delegate
notes: Amendments1978—Subsec. (b). substituted allegiance requirement for provision requiring United States citizenship for at least seven years prior to the date of the election.Pub. L. 95–584
amendments: Amendments1978—Subsec. (b). substituted allegiance requirement for provision requiring United States citizenship for at least seven years prior to the date of the election.Pub. L. 95–584

children.label: a
children.text: be at least twenty-five years of age on the date of the election;

children.label: b
children.text: owe allegiance to the United States;

children.label: c
children.text: be an inhabitant of the Territory of American Samoa; and

children.label: d
children.text: not be, on the date of the election, a candidate for any other office.
